blended.narrative: Crystal Mountain is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 9 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 2,629 ft. Looking ahead, 25 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 3.3" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Wednesday: 3.7" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 56.4" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 27" over the past week. Current depth: 88".
